message:
fix(deps): convert absolute fsqlite dependency paths to relative

Replace hardcoded /dp/frankensqlite/... absolute paths with relative
../../../frankensqlite/... paths for all four fsqlite crate dependencies
(fsqlite, fsqlite-core, fsqlite-types, fsqlite-error), making the
project portable across environments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
